title: phyllagathis elattandra
intro: Phyllagathis elattandra is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as the Elattandra or Red-eyed Phyllagathis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllagathis elattandra include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for consumption.
